class.name: FmodAudioStreamAdvanced
class.brief_description: Advanced FMOD audio stream resource with extra sound creation options.
class.description: FmodAudioStreamAdvanced extends [FmodAudioStream] and exposes additional FMOD_CREATESOUNDEXINFO fields for special audio files. Use it when a stream needs a file offset, explicit length, subsound selection, raw PCM format information, encryption key, DLS bank, initial seek position, or other low-level FMOD creation settings. Most ordinary MP3, WAV, OGG Vorbis, and FLAC files should use [FmodAudioStream]. This class is intended for files that need format hints or advanced FMOD loading control.

method.name: load_from_file
method.description: Loads an external file into a new [FmodAudioStreamAdvanced] resource and applies the supplied FMOD mode flags.

members.member: Optional decode buffer size in PCM samples. Leave at [code]0[/code] to let FMOD choose the default.
Default sample rate for raw PCM data. Leave at [code]0[/code] unless the file format requires it.
Optional DLS bank path used by MIDI playback.
Optional FMOD encryption key for encrypted sound data.
Byte offset where the audio data starts inside the supplied buffer.
Raw PCM sample format hint. Leave as [constant FmodSound.FMOD_SOUND_FORMAT_NONE] for normal encoded files.
If enabled, FMOD ignores the custom file system callbacks for this stream creation request.
Optional list of subsounds to include when loading container formats.
Optional initial seek position applied when the sound is created.
Initial subsound index to load or play. Use [code]-1[/code] for FMOD's default behavior.
Optional byte length override for the audio data. Leave at [code]0[/code] to use the full buffer size.
Optional maximum polyphony for the created sound. Leave at [code]0[/code] for FMOD's default.
Channel count hint for raw PCM data.
Number of subsounds to load from a container format. Leave at [code]0[/code] for FMOD's default.
Optional sound type hint used when FMOD cannot infer the file type reliably.
